description: Owned-website pharmacies — services fetched from owned pages
fetch_notes: All pages fetched by automated WebFetch tool. 404s and permission denials noted per competitor. CHL pages for Sultan and getmeds.ca returned access-denied (permission denial) and could not be retrieved. healthshield.ca/rxmanage/ returned 404. sultanpharmacy.ca/contact returned permission denied — CHL record used as fallback. dufferinfinchpharmacy.ca/contact.html and /services.html returned 404 or no additional service data.

competitors.name: HealthShield Pharmacy
competitors.raw_service_text: Pharmacy Services, Compounding, Express Care Clinic, Preventive Care, Free Canada-wide prescription delivery, Compliance Packaging (HealthPak), Medication Review, PrEP & PEP services, Chronic Prescription Renewals, Flu Vaccinations, Opioid Dependence Treatment, Blood Pressure Checks, Central Fill Compounding, Central Fill Compliance Packaging.

Express Care Clinic (walk-in clinic on-site)

HealthPak compliance packaging (branded blister packs)

competitors.pricing_notes: Free Canada-wide delivery stated. No specific dispensing fee or blister pack pricing mentioned.

competitors.name: Sultan Pharmacy
competitors.raw_service_text: FREE DELIVERY / COMPOUNDING / FLU SHOT. Senior discounts. Home health care supplies — wheelchair, walkers, cane by order. Medication placed in blister packs at no extra cost. Simple non-sterile compounding of some medication. Free seasonal flu vaccine. Blood pressure checks. Free delivery of prescription medication. Treatment and prescriptions for common ailments (rashes, pink eye, insect bites, acne, urinary tract infections). MedsCheck appointments. Pharmacy smoking cessation program (ODB recipients only).
notable_services: Multilingual service in English, Persian, and Turkish
WhatsApp contact available (+16474259730) — modern patient communication
Smoking cessation program (ODB recipients only)
Home health supplies by order (wheelchair, walkers, canes)
Blister packs at no extra cost
products_sold: Home health care supplies: wheelchairs, walkers, canes (by order)
competitors.pricing_notes: Blister packs at no extra cost. Free delivery. Free flu shot. Senior discounts mentioned but amount not specified. Smoking cessation for ODB recipients only. Dispensing fee applies; some medications covered by OHIP.

competitors.name: The Station Apothecary
competitors.raw_service_text: Complex compounding — specialized compounding pharmacy dedicated to personalized medication solutions. Free blister packaging to help manage prescriptions more effectively. Complimentary seasonal flu shots. Compression therapy products. Free prescription delivery within the GTA. Minor ailment treatment (rashes, pink eye, insect bites, acne, urinary tract infections). Paxlovid prescribing for COVID-19 antiviral treatment. MedsCheck program for complex prescription reviews.

Branded as 'complex compounding pharmacy' — a specialty positioning
Free blister packaging
Free delivery within GTA
Compression therapy products sold in-store
Part of Healthful Pharmacy group (multi-location independent network)
competitors.pricing_notes: Free blister packaging. Free seasonal flu shots. Free prescription delivery within GTA.

competitors.name: Total Health Pharmacy
competitors.raw_service_text: Online Prescription Refills. Customized Medication Packaging (blister packs, strip packaging). Delivery Services at select locations. Medication Reviews (MedsCheck). Medication Guide. Home Healthcare Support. Diabetes Management consultations. Psychogeriatric Support. Compounding Services at select locations. Telemedicine via MedEssist. Partnerships with retirement homes, nursing homes, group homes, special needs housing. Multidisciplinary team including family physicians, physiotherapists, dietitians, naturopaths, chiropodists, and lab technicians.

Partnerships with long-term care and retirement homes (institutional accounts)

competitors.name: University Health Centre Pharmacy (getmeds.ca)
competitors.raw_service_text: Professional medication counselling. MedsCheck program. Blister pack compliance packaging available. Health & Beauty products and over-the-counter medications. Blood Pressure Monitoring. Complimentary delivery to anywhere in Ontario. Free pick-up and delivery throughout the Greater Toronto Area. FedEx worldwide shipping. Fax & photocopy service. Senior discounts — no $2 charge for ODB seniors and social assistance patients. Accepts Ontario Blue Cross, Green Shield Canada, Ontario Drug Benefit, and WSIB.
notable_services: FedEx worldwide shipping of medications — rare differentiator
Province-wide free delivery across all of Ontario (not just local/GTA)
No $2 dispensing fee for ODB seniors and social assistance patients
Fax and photocopy service
WSIB billing accepted
competitors.pricing_notes: Free pick-up and delivery throughout GTA. Complimentary delivery anywhere in Ontario. FedEx worldwide shipping (fee not specified). No extra $2 charge for ODB seniors and social assistance patients.
